title: Diagonal Panes
description: It's diagonal glass panes. (And iron bars, and stained glass panes, stop asking)
body: It's diagonal glass panes. (And iron bars, and stained glass panes, stop asking) Details: When panes form an "L" shape, the corner is smoothed into a diagonal wall instead. "I", "T" and "X" shapes are unchanged. Changelog: releases
